design_philosophy: Objective, highly functional, developer-first dashboard inspired by Vercel and Linear. No fluff, no gradients. Strict contrast, dense data presentation, and clear binary statuses.

headings.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep them sharp and compact.

mono.usage: Use for API keys, JSON payloads, phone numbers, UUIDs, and timestamps.

layout.structure: Sidebar (w-64, border-r border-zinc-200, bg-zinc-50/50 backdrop-blur-md) + Main Content (flex-1, p-6 md:p-8)
layout.card: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-xl shadow-sm p-6
layout.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 generously inside containers to avoid text collision with borders.

components.buttons: rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-zinc-400 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50
components.inputs: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-zinc-200 bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-zinc-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-zinc-950 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50
components.tables: w-full caption-bottom text-sm. Header: border-b border-zinc-200 text-left align-middle font-medium text-zinc-500. Row: border-b border-zinc-200 transition-colors hover:bg-zinc-50/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-zinc-50. Use JetBrains Mono for data columns.
components.badges: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-400 focus:ring-offset-2
components.qr_scanner_card: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-200 rounded-2xl bg-zinc-50/50 transition-all hover:border-zinc-300

interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts (bg-zinc-50) rather than heavy shadows.

images.description: White concrete building facade pattern - Use as a subtle architectural background for the Login/Register split screen on the right side. Add an opacity-40 overlay for readability.

icons.style: stroke-width: 1.5, text-zinc-500 for inactive, text-zinc-900 for active/headers

auth.layout: Split screen: left side form (clean, centered, w-full max-w-sm mx-auto), right side decorative abstract architecture image with an overlay quoting a developer.

dashboard.layout: Top-left focus metrics (Active Sessions, Messages Sent). Below: Mini-charts or tables of recent activity.

sessions.layout: List of connected numbers in a grid or table. 'Add New' opens a modal or side-panel to QR connection flow. QR view must have a skeleton loader and clear instructions.

send_message.layout: Two-column form: Left side configuration (select session, enter number, text), right side live mobile preview of the message.

broadcast.layout: Upload CSV area (dashed dropzone) + mapping fields + compose message.

auto_reply.layout: Rule builder: IF [Keyword] THEN [Template]. Clean rows with 'Add Rule' button.

history.layout: Dense data table. Phone numbers in JetBrains Mono. Statuses as pills.

api_keys.layout: List of keys (partially masked). 'Generate Key' button. One-click copy interactions.

api_docs.layout: Code-heavy layout. Two-column: Left side endpoints/parameters in prose, right side dark-mode code blocks for cURL/JS examples.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='qr-code-canvas').

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure global css handles Satoshi and JetBrains Mono fonts. You can import from a CDN (Fontshare for Satoshi, Google Fonts for JetBrains Mono).
Strictly avoid any purple, teal, or generic gradient backgrounds.
Use Shadcn UI components for all logical interactive parts (Select, Table, Dropdown, Dialog).
For the QR Code scanning area, ensure there is a clear loading state (skeleton) before the QR canvas renders.
